name: Vale of White Horse District Council

budgetCategories.label: Environment & Streets
budgetCategories.description: Waste, street cleaning, parks and environmental health.

budgetCategories.label: Council Running Costs
budgetCategories.description: Core staff, finance, IT, legal and democratic services.

budgetCategories.label: Planning & Development
budgetCategories.description: Planning applications, building control and local development.

budgetCategories.label: Housing
budgetCategories.description: Housing advice, homelessness support and council homes.

budgetCategories.label: Culture & Leisure
budgetCategories.description: Libraries, museums, sports, arts and leisure services.

budgetCategories.label: Roads & Transport
budgetCategories.description: Road maintenance, public transport and local travel.

feedItems.description: allocated £8.5m to Environment & Streets (≈£57 per resident)
allocated £6.1m to Council Running Costs (≈£41 per resident)
allocated £3.5m to Planning & Development (≈£23 per resident)
raised Band D council tax by £115 (4.9%) to £2457
